name: vibe-test
description: Test analyzer and generator for vibe-coded apps. Classifies your app by type and maturity tier, audits existing coverage honestly (no cherry-picked denominators), and generates the tests that actually matter proportional to deployment risk.

commands.name: vibe-test:audit
commands.description: Inventory + classify + score — diagnoses whole testing posture

commands.name: vibe-test:fix
commands.description: Diagnose + repair broken tests or harnesses

commands.name: vibe-test:coverage
commands.description: Honest-denominator coverage measurement with tier interpretation

commands.name: vibe-test:gate
commands.description: CI-safe pass/fail against app tier threshold

commands.name: vibe-test:posture
commands.description: Read-only ambient summary of current testing posture
